queue.title: Approval queue
queue.subtitle: Approve or reject pending product submissions.

filters.description: The admin queue shows customer submissions waiting for review.

details.title: Review {{name}}
details.body: Check the submission details before taking action.

reject.title: Reject {{name}}?
reject.body: This moves the product out of the customer-visible approval queue.
reject.placeholder: Optional reason for the customer or audit trail

artists.title: Artists
artists.subtitle: Manage artist profiles and review customer submissions.

published.title: No published artists yet
published.body: Create the first artist profile to make it available for products.

pending.title: No artists pending review
pending.body: Customer artist requests will appear here.

rejected.title: No rejected artists
rejected.body: Rejected artist requests are kept here for audit and corrections.

editor.subtitle: Profile details are used across product creation and catalog views.

fields.name: Name
fields.countryHint: Optional ISO-2 country code, for example NL or US.

errors.uploadStatus: Image upload failed with status {{status}}. Try again.

delete.title: Delete artist?
delete.body: This permanently deletes {{name}} if no products reference the artist.
delete.blockedBody: {{count}} products reference this artist. Reassign them before deleting.
delete.hasMore: More products also reference this artist.
